0700–1500 Day
5 RN1 LPN4 CA
1430–1830 Eve Early

1830–2230 Eve Late
5 RN1 LPN4 CA
2230–0630 Night

🎯 9-Box Talent Matrix
Auto-scored from attendance · quality · certs · falls/HAPIs · Click cell to manually override
Scoring factors:
📅 Attendance 40% — call-outs, tardies, write-ups
💉 Quality 45% — scan %, pain reassessment %, transfusion
🛡 Safety 15% — unit falls & HAPIs
Potential = attendance trend + write-ups + cert compliance
← Performance →
Low
Moderate
High
High
← Potential →
Low
Unassigned Staff

☁️ Supabase Live Sync
Real-time multi-user sync · Free · No IT approval needed
How it works: Everyone opens the same HTML file. Connect to your shared Supabase project — data syncs automatically within seconds whenever anyone saves.
Setup: Click ☁️ Sync Off in the header → enter your Supabase URL and anon key → Connect.
📥 UKG Import
Upload or paste UKG Condensed Staffing report
📊
Drop UKG Excel file here or click to browse
Accepts .xlsx · Condensed Staffing format
Or Paste Text Data
Parser Info

Parser rule: UKG Day/Eve1/Eve2/Night grid is read directly.
RN/LPN 07:00 in Day = 0700-1500 · RN/LPN 07:00 in Eve1 = 1500-1900
Only RN/LPN 19:00 in Eve2/Night = 1900-0700
Higley/Nurse Mgr rows are removed automatically.

Where data goes: Records are saved to the Absence tab and feed into Coaching auto-suggestions and 9-Box scoring.

🗣 Daily Safety Huddle
Edit weekly content · Print double-sided (front = report, back = form)
Chief Nursing Officer & Nursing Operations
Daily Safety Shift Huddle Title
Safety Topics / Content
Enter each numbered topic on its own line. Use "Answer: ..." on the next line for Q&A items.
Arnot Health Weekly Announcements
Announcements & Memos
One item per line. Use • or - bullets, or leave plain.
Audit Link (optional)
Unit / Department Announcements
Recognitions / Compliments / What is Going Well
Patient comments should be read aloud every Tuesday during AM and PM huddles
